name: Peano Arithmetic & Gödel — Part 4: First-Order Logic
description: First-order logic: syntax (terms, formulas), semantics (structures, interpretations), satisfaction relation, and deductive system. Prerequisites for Gödel's Completeness Theorem.
mermaid:
graph TD
    DefLang["Def: Language L (symbols, arities)"]
    DefTerm["Def: Term (variables, constants, function symbols)"]
    DefForm["Def: Formula (atomic, ¬, ∧, ∨, →, ∀, ∃)"]
    DefStruct["Def: Structure M = (domain, interpretations)"]
    DefAssign["Def: Variable assignment s: Var → |M|"]
    DefSat["Def: Satisfaction M ⊨ φ[s]"]
    DefValid["Def: Validity: φ true in all models"]
    DefDed["Def: Deductive system (axioms, MP, Gen)"]
    DefProv["Def: Provability T ⊢ φ"]
    LemSatComp["Lem: Satisfaction for compound formulas"]
    LemSubst["Lem: Substitution lemma M ⊨ φ[t/x][s] iff M ⊨ φ[s(x|t^M)]"]
    ThmSoundness["Thm: Soundness: T ⊢ φ ⇒ T ⊨ φ"]
    DefLang --> DefTerm
    DefLang --> DefForm
    DefTerm --> DefForm
    DefStruct --> DefAssign
    DefAssign --> DefSat
    DefForm --> DefSat
    DefSat --> DefValid
    DefSat --> LemSatComp
    LemSatComp --> LemSubst
    DefDed --> DefProv
    DefSat --> ThmSoundness
    DefProv --> ThmSoundness
    LemSubst --> ThmSoundness
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lemma fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class DefLang,DefTerm,DefForm,DefStruct,DefAssign,DefSat,DefValid,DefDed,DefProv definition
    class LemSatComp,LemSubst lemma
    class ThmSoundness theorem
